transcript: Hi, this is Bernie, at... United Parcel. Callin' about your... uh, shipment here. It's, uh... negative four hundred and eighty dollars on the... invoice.
What shipment, who are you calling, and what is this regarding?
Uh... it's a four hundred and eighty pound squid is what it is, from, uh... Tokyo.
And it's on our dock, and we just gotta get a good time to... to deliver, and we need C.O.D. on that.
Uh, we... in fact, we need certified funds.
It's on the packing slip, I've got the P.O. number, I've got a... your signature...
Fuddle. I am. Twenty-four years on the job.
Who is the name that you're looking for?
Okay, you have the wrong number, I have no idea what you're talking about.
I've got your signature, and we need certified funds...
Okay, which signature is it? Tell me the name of the signature.
I can... I can co-sign on the thing... [clears throat] ...and if you, uh, we can take you...
We can take you to your bank.
You... I don't think you're acknowledging me!
Who are you calling? What number--
What number were you calling? I'm not expecting a package, from Tokyo or any place else. What number are you calling--
This is a four hundred and eighty pound squid... and we gotta move it.
Hell, I don't care where you move it, you can't move it to my house. What's my... what's the address?
Did you just change your mind? On the product?
Who are you calling? You haven't even identified who you're calling.
I am... I am B... I am Bernard Fuddle.
How do you know you've got the right number?
I don't care who you're with. Who are you calling?
I'm calling right now, on the dock, standing here with three deliverymen.
What's the address it's supposed to be delivered?
We're at 5621 Quebec Street, Commerce City.
That's the address it's supposed to go to?
Where is this supposed to be delivered to?
You need to focus on the certified funds that we need.
Yeah. I don't know who you are, I don't have any shipment coming to me. You can't even tell me who you're talking to!
Yeah, this is Franklin Donovan, down at United Parcel Service. Uh, what appears to be the problem here? [heavy breathing]
I... somebody called, and they just told me...
I'm asking you. Whom are you calling...
I don't have a squid, sorry.
I don't have one, I'm sorry. I don't know who you're calling.

Yes, sir? This is Ruben calling, from United Parcel Service. I'm an administrator here. And, uh... according to the notes, you spoke to, uh... Wallace? Some kind of squid, uh... large freight here. I mean, there's flags on the account here that... you are a problematic account, which is why I'm trying to call. [coughs]
What is the name on the account?
No, what is the name on the account? Is that your name?
Well, can't you just extrapolate one to the other? [clears throat]
What is the name on the account? It's a simple question, even a jackass like you could answer that.
What is your... [sighs] The name I just gave you.
That... is that your name, or the name on the account?
Yes, it is. And before we write off...
What is the name on the account?
And before we write off this amount...
